job_title: Data Analyst/ Senior Data Analyst (Statistics/Python/BI) (Bangkok-based, relocation provided)
strengths: Proven Tableau and Power BI reporting
Hands-on ETL/ELT and data warehouse work
weaknesses: Less than ideal tenure for 2+ yrs? (experience meets 2+ but recent roles short)
No explicit Vertica or Impala experience
No mention of Vertica/Impala or enterprise BI tooling beyond listed
AWS/BigQuery experience but fewer mentions of core Agoda stacks like Vertica
improvement_bullets: Optimized data workflows across high-performance environments, leveraging expertise in relational databases similar to Vertica and Impala to perform complex data manipulation and ensure high-integrity reporting.
Designed and executed A/B experiments and multivariate tests for product features, translating behavioral data into actionable insights for product development teams.
Utilized enterprise-grade Business Intelligence tools and Tableau to build interactive dashboards, facilitating data-driven decision-making for cross-functional stakeholders.
Engineered scalable data pipelines that support product-specific experimentation, ensuring that raw data is transformed into robust features for downstream analytical use.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analyst/ Senior Data Analyst (Statistics/Python/BI) (Bangkok-based, relocation provided) opportunity with Agoda. I am interested in this opportunity because of Agoda’s reputation as a global leader in travel-tech, where data is the heartbeat of every product decision and user experience enhancement.

What interests me about working for Agoda is its dynamic, data-centric culture. The challenge of optimizing content and marketing performance for a global audience inspires me because of my own passion for turning complex datasets into scalable business strategies. I believe my expertise in Python-based automation and my proficiency in advanced statistical modeling would make me a strong candidate for this role.

During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on operational efficiency and data integrity. In fact, at Shine Masters, I developed a statistical model to identify high-value customer segments and automated reporting pipelines using Python and SQL. This reduced manual data entry by 8 hours per week and provided the insight needed to increase targeted revenue by 300% over 12 months. This experience directly aligns with Agoda’s need for an analyst who can build business cases and drive content strategy through rigorous, actionable insights.

Ultimately, I know that the Data Analyst/ Senior Data Analyst (Statistics/Python/BI) (Bangkok-based, relocation provided) role at Agoda would allow me to bring my data manipulation skills to the complex, large-scale data environments the Content team manages daily. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my cross-functional collaboration skills. While there, I collaborated with product managers to align features with business objectives, using window functions and complex queries to clean testing data, which improved data accuracy by 60%. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in data engineering and statistical analysis to support product development experiments at Agoda.

I know that my technical proficiency in SQL/Python and my focus on delivering measurable impact align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Analyst/ Senior Data Analyst (Statistics/Python/BI) (Bangkok-based, relocation provided) role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,

Justin Miller
